title: GrowthStates
description: Easily see crop growth stages in vibrant colors from red → yellow → green.
body:
### Overview
**Growth States** is a Minecraft resource pack that shows **all crop growth stages** in clear, **vibrant colors from red → yellow → green**, so you can see **exactly when each crop is ready to harvest**, making farming easier and more visually satisfying.

---

### Permissions / License
You may **use and edit** this resource pack for **personal use**.  
You may **not redistribute, sell, or claim it as your own**.  
**Credit to the creator** is appreciated if sharing publicly.

Check out my TikTok: [Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@teddz.fr?_r=1&_t=ZS-920AjtHgOQy)
